title: Aureline registry-parity assertion vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for registry-parity assertion records. A parity-assertion record binds a public-registry, approved-mirror, private-registry, offline-bundle, or local-archive subject row to the closed trust / provenance / compatibility / runtime-cost / safety-policy / maintainership / bridge-state / anti-abuse / publisher-lifecycle vocabulary frozen by schemas/extensions/registry_manifest.schema.json, schemas/extensions/discovery_ranking_reason.schema.json, schemas/extensions/discovery_badge.schema.json, schemas/extensions/publisher_lifecycle_event.schema.json, and artifacts/extensions/anti_abuse_states.yaml. The assertion forces enterprise / private registries and approved mirrors to use exactly the same vocabulary as public discovery surfaces while still naming the registry source directly. Adding a new parity_axis_class, parity_state_class, parity_violation_consequence_class, parity_evidence_class, or parity_audit_event_id is additive-minor with a registry_parity_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw artifact bytes, raw signing-key material, raw URLs, raw publisher-private data, raw repository paths, and raw popularity counts MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs and class labels only.

registry_parity_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this registry-parity vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

registry_source_class.description: Mirrors registry_manifest.schema.json#/$defs/registry_source_class verbatim. Every parity assertion explicitly names the registry source it applies to; private / mirror / offline-bundle / local-archive lanes never bypass disclosure simply because they are internal or on-disk.

redaction_class.description: Mirrors registry_manifest.schema.json#/$defs/redaction_class. Raw artifact bytes, raw URLs, raw repository paths, raw publisher-private fields MUST NOT appear on any sink.

parity_axis_class.description: Closed parity-axis vocabulary. Every parity-axis row asserts that the subject registry / mirror / private-registry / offline-bundle / local-archive lane projects the same closed vocabulary that public discovery surfaces project. registry_source_naming_axis pins that the lane names its registry_source_class directly rather than smuggling a public-registry-shaped class onto a non-public lane.

parity_state_class.description: Closed parity-state vocabulary. The 'parity_held_*' states admit the lane onto every consumer surface; the 'parity_violated_*' states block the lane from projecting onto discovery / install-review until the violation is repaired. parity_held_with_capped_inheritance is the honest default for approved-mirror, private-registry, offline-bundle, and local-archive lanes that cap the rendered trust tier at organisational / community / unverified per registry_manifest.schema.json's trust_badge_inheritance_rule.

parity_violation_consequence_class.description: Closed parity-violation-consequence vocabulary. Every assertion names exactly one consequence. parity_held_* states pair with no_consequence_parity_held; parity_violated_* states pair with one of the active consequences. Silent fallback to a generic 'parity issue' chip is forbidden.

parity_evidence_class.description: Closed evidence-class vocabulary the parity assertion may cite. A surface that hides a cited evidence row is denied with review_disclosure_incomplete.

rendered_label.description: Human-legible label rendered on the parity row of the support-export / moderation review surface. Raw publisher-private material forbidden.

explanation_label.description: Inspectable explanation rendered when the user opens the axis row. Raw publisher-private material forbidden.

evidence_class_set.description: The closed evidence classes cited for this axis. Surfaces resolve evidence_refs through this typed list rather than dereferencing raw row bodies.

allOf.description: parity_held_* states MUST pair with consequence_class = no_consequence_parity_held.
parity_violated_* states MUST pair with a consequence other than no_consequence_parity_held.

parity_axis_assertion.description: One parity-axis assertion. Every parity record carries one axis assertion per parity_axis_class so consumers can render a typed table of (axis, state, consequence) without re-deriving the parity state per surface.

subject_registry_endpoint_ref.description: Ref to the registry / mirror / private-registry / offline-bundle / local-archive endpoint record. Raw URLs / repository paths never carried.

subject_registry_manifest_row_ref.description: Ref to the registry_manifest_row the parity assertion applies to. The assertion always applies to a concrete row; lane-level parity assertions are recorded as a set of per-row records.

registry_source_named.description: True when the subject lane explicitly names its registry_source_class on every consumer surface. False values are non-conforming and MUST be paired with parity_overall_state_class = parity_violated_registry_source_not_named so the violation is captured by a typed audit event.

trust_badge_inheritance_rule_carried.description: Mirrors registry_manifest.schema.json#/$defs/trust_badge_inheritance_rule. Carried on the parity record so the moderation / support-export surface can render it directly without re-dereferencing the registry-manifest row.

publisher_continuity_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0012 publisher_continuity_row the subject row binds to. Raw publisher identity never carried.

publisher_lifecycle_event_record_refs.description: Refs to publisher_lifecycle_event_record rows whose effective_at falls inside the parity-window. Hiding any of these denies with review_disclosure_incomplete; private-registry lanes MUST cite the same lifecycle records as public-registry lanes.

anti_abuse_state_row_refs.description: Refs to anti_abuse_state_id rows from artifacts/extensions/anti_abuse_states.yaml engaged on the subject row. A private-registry lane MUST NOT hide an engaged anti-abuse state row simply because the lane is internal.

discovery_result_row_ref.description: Ref to the discovery_result_row the subject row projects onto. Null when the subject row is suppressed from discovery (e.g. quarantined_local_copy).

axis_assertion_set.description: Exactly ten parity-axis assertions, one per parity_axis_class. The complete set is required so surfaces never silently drop an axis; the schema enforces minItems = maxItems = 10.

rendered_label.description: Human-legible label rendered on the parity row in support-export / moderation review surfaces.

explanation_label.description: Inspectable explanation rendered when the user opens the parity row.

allOf.description: parity_overall_state_class in parity_held_* MUST pair with parity_overall_consequence_class = no_consequence_parity_held.
parity_overall_state_class in parity_violated_* MUST pair with parity_overall_consequence_class != no_consequence_parity_held.
registry_source_named = false MUST pair with parity_overall_state_class = parity_violated_registry_source_not_named.

approved_mirror, private_registry, offline_bundle, and local_archive subjects MUST carry a trust_badge_inheritance_rule_carried in {capped_at_organisational_on_private_registry, capped_at_community_on_approved_mirror, capped_at_unverified_on_local_archive, quarantined_cannot_inherit, inherits_origin_tier} and pair the trust axis to parity_held_with_capped_inheritance unless the lane re-verified the origin signature with a fresh revocation snapshot. Public-registry subjects MAY use inherits_origin_tier with parity_held_full_vocabulary_match.
approved_mirror subjects MUST carry trust_badge_inheritance_rule_carried in {inherits_origin_tier, capped_at_community_on_approved_mirror, quarantined_cannot_inherit}.
private_registry subjects MUST carry trust_badge_inheritance_rule_carried in {inherits_origin_tier, capped_at_organisational_on_private_registry, quarantined_cannot_inherit}.
axis_assertion_set MUST contain exactly one assertion per parity_axis_class; the closed set is asserted via a contains gate per axis so surfaces cannot silently drop an axis.

registry_parity_assertion_record.description: One registry-parity assertion. Discovery, install-review, installed-row, support-export, and moderation surfaces project the same record; private-registry / approved-mirror / offline-bundle / local-archive lanes do not bypass any axis simply because they are internal.
